subtitle: A specialty shop for the mushroom forager
about_p1: Svampskogen is a specialty store for anyone who loves nature and the world of mushrooms, located in Mitt Möllan in Malmö. I'm Kristian Berg, and I want to create a carefully curated destination for seasoned foragers and curious beginners alike.
about_p2: You'll find foraging knives, baskets, books, dried mushrooms, growing kits, dehydrators, and I also exhibit art by local artists inspired by nature and mushrooms.
about_p3: Whether you're looking for a gift, a new hobby, or quality gear, you're welcome to come in!
suppliers_p1: I'm actively looking to collaborate with Scandinavian producers, makers, and artists whose products and work fit the profile of Svampskogen. I'm happy to get in touch!
